channel.title: Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yong-Siang Shih (施詠翔)

item.title: Deep Networks
item.description: My implementations of deep neural networks for practice

item.title: Snappycat
item.description: A command line tool to decompress snappy files produced by Hadoop

item.title: Anobii2Goodreads
item.description: Utilities to convert exported Anobii CSV files to Goodreads

item.title: Open Source Contributions
item.description: My open source contributions, which are mostly PRs sent via GitHub

item.title: CS Dream
item.description: An open book that introduces computer science to the general audience

item.title: Dala Agent
item.description: An agent to play the Dala game, learned with genetic algorithms

item.title: Amazeing
item.description: An two-player maze game implemented with PCM7230 and Openmoko Neo FreeRunner

item.title: ArkanoidOnVerilog
item.description: An Arkanoid-like game using Verilog. Developed on a Xilinx Spartan-3E Starter Kit FPGA Board, XC3S500E FG320.

item.title: FreeArray Input Method
item.description: An Array30 input method implementation under Linux using IBus

item.title: Gifted
item.description: A novel website created in 2005, which won 1st Prize in Acer Digital Innovation Award
